home.hero_headline:
Your system.
Your rules.
Your pace.
home.hero_sub:
Whether you're building your first digital presence or replacing a system that stopped working, we engineer it, we run it, and you control it.

No agencies. No middlemen. No platform fees eating your margin.
home.services_heading: From your first page on the internet to a full operations system, we scope, build, and ship.
home.who_body:
Maybe you've never had a website and you're not sure where to start.

Maybe you have one, and it's not doing anything for the business.

Maybe you're running your operation on spreadsheets, WhatsApp, and willpower, and you know there's a better way, but you're not sure what to ask for.

Maybe you've outgrown Shopify, Wix, or whatever someone set up for you three years ago.

Any of those is a good place to start. We've been there with clients at every stage.
home.services_heading: From your first page on the internet to a full operations system, we scope, build, and ship.
home.delivery_intro:
Every project is different.
So is every delivery.

Not every business needs to own the engine to drive the car.

We offer three ways to work with us, based on how much control you want over what's under the hood.
home.delivery_hosted_body:
We run it. You use it.

Your system is live, maintained, and fully operational. You get admin access, training, and a dashboard built for your workflow, not for developers. We handle everything below the surface.
home.delivery_hosted_best: Best for: local businesses, first-time digital clients, teams without in-house tech.
home.delivery_managed_body:
More visibility. Same reliability.

Everything in Hosted, plus expanded access: technical documentation, deeper control panels, and priority support. You see more of what's happening, without needing to manage it yourself.
home.delivery_managed_best: Best for: growing businesses that want transparency without the technical overhead.
home.delivery_architect_body:
Full release. Total ownership.

Complete source code, repository access, full technical documentation, and a structured handoff. You own every line, deploy it anywhere, with anyone, forever.
home.delivery_architect_best: Best for: companies with in-house dev teams, technical founders, or businesses that want zero dependency on any vendor, including us.
home.delivery_cta: Not sure which fits? That's what the first conversation is for.
home.methodology_intro: No status meetings. No agency layers. The engineer who scoped your project is the one building it.
home.methodology_phase1_body: We learn your business before we write a single line of code. What you actually need, not what you asked for on day one.
home.methodology_phase2_body: Structure first, aesthetics second. Everything is reviewed with you before it moves forward.
home.methodology_phase3_body: Clean code, strict TypeScript, zero shortcuts. Built to last, not built to be replaced in 18 months.
home.methodology_phase4_body: Deployed, documented, and handed off on your terms, at the tier you chose.

methodology_timeline.label: PHASE_001
methodology_timeline.title: DISCOVERY
methodology_timeline.description: Deep immersion into brand DNA and technical constraints. We define the scope, goals, and parameters of the digital ecosystem before writing a single line of code.

methodology_timeline.label: PHASE_002
methodology_timeline.title: DESIGN
methodology_timeline.description: Iterative construction of the visual and structural language. Every pixel has weight and purpose. We review each decision with you before moving forward.

methodology_timeline.label: PHASE_003
methodology_timeline.title: DEVELOPMENT
methodology_timeline.description: Meticulous translation of pixels into performant code. We build the silent engine of the experience: clean, strict, zero shortcuts, designed to last.

methodology_timeline.label: PHASE_004
methodology_timeline.title: LAUNCH
methodology_timeline.description: Final optimization and deployment to the global stage. The signal is sent. We polish, document, and hand off on your terms, at the tier you chose.

home.nfe_body:
If you need a website in 48 hours, we're not it.

If your budget is $300 and your expectations are enterprise, we're not it.

If you want a vendor you can ignore and everything still works forever, nobody is that.

But if you want a system built for your actual workflow, a partner who speaks plainly, and software you won't outgrow in two years, that's exactly what we do.
home.final_cta_sub:
Whether it's a system that doesn't fit your workflow, a platform eating your margins, or a project you need built from scratch, this is where that conversation starts.

No commitment. No technical background required. Just tell us where you are.

quote.field1_placeholder: We run a trucking company between Piedras Negras and San Antonio.

quote.confirmation: We'll respond within 48 hours. No pitch deck. No sales call unless you want one. Just a direct reply from the person who'd be building it.

about.origin_headline:
Built at the border.
For businesses that live there.
about.origin_body:
yeblanca is a micro-consultancy, not an agency.

Founded in 2024 by Juan Pablo Lozano Escareño in Piedras Negras, Coahuila. Right on the US–Mexico border, where bilingual, binational, and production-ready aren't differentiators. They're the minimum.

The micro matters: when you work with yeblanca, you work directly with the engineer building your system. No account managers. No translation layers. No junior developer inheriting your project on week three.

Five years building production systems across retail, fintech, and cross-border commerce. The Texas– México logistics corridor isn't a niche for us, it's the context we've always worked in.
about.founder_bio: 5+ years building production systems across fintech, retail, and civic tech. Specialized in Next.js, TypeScript, and complex data pipelines. Known as Bytewing.
about.founder_note: "Piedras Negras is a market that's just getting started. We're not here to capture as many clients as possible, we're here to build things that actually work, for businesses ready to grow."

contact.page_sub: Have a question or just want to say hi? We read every message.

contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
